name: Grayscale Zcash Trust (ZEC)
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness Overview of the Trust and the Shares Grayscale Zcash Trust (ZEC) (the Trust) is a Delaware Statutory Trust that was formed on October 23, 2017 by the filing of the Certificate of Trust with the Delaware Secretary of State in accordance with the provisions of the Delaware Statutory Trust Act. The Trusts purpose is to hold Zcash (ZEC). Zcash, an alternative software implementation of Bitcoin, was created in 2016 by a group of scientists, cryptographers, and engineers. See ...
